mapper.select:
SELECT INQUIRY_ID AS inquiryId, TITLE, CONTENT, ANSWER_CONTENT AS answerContent, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INQUIRIES WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY INQUIRY_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRIES WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_ID) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
